text: US agrees to halt talks with Iran for a week as funeral for Khamenei begins - Fox News
fullText: Denuclearization talks between the U.S. and Iran are on hold for a week as the Iranian government prepares a funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in Tehran, the capital. The funeral is expected to last from July 4 to July 9.

text: Trump to speak at Mount Rushmore, one monument he can’t remake - NBC News

text: Trump administration’s interpretation of slavery under George Washington can be reinstalled - Politico

text: Nearly half of Americans surveyed don't know what America 250 commemorates - NPR
fullText: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.
